office_does: The auditor administers elections, licensing, document recording, marriage licenses, and county financial functions.
race_blurb: Incumbent Nicole Deskins faces election administrator Dotsi Graves; both have direct current experience in the office.

candidates.summary: Graves is the county election administrator with direct responsibility for election operations and candidate support.
highlights: The county candidate guide documents her election-administration role [S2]

experience.basis: Direct current service in the auditor's office supports a substantial, though non-incumbent, institutional record.

candidates.summary: Deskins is the incumbent auditor with a record covering elections, licensing, recording, and financial administration.
highlights: Her documented duties span election and county financial functions [S2]

experience.basis: Incumbency and direct administration of the full office support the proven-record pole.
